sentences.arabic: أَقْرَأُ الْأَخْبَارَ عَلَى الْمَوَاقِعِ الْإِخْبَارِيَّةِ كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ.
sentences.translation: Svako jutro čitam vijesti na informativnim portalima.
sentences.translationEn: I read the news on news websites every morning.

sentences.arabic: الْأَخْبَارُ الرَّقْمِيَّةُ أَسْرَعُ مِنَ الصُّحُفِ التَّقْلِيدِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Digitalne vijesti su brže od tradicionalnih novina.
sentences.translationEn: Digital news is faster than traditional newspapers.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ أَنْ نَتَأَكَّدَ مِنْ مَصْدَرِ الْخَبَرِ قَبْلَ نَشْرِهِ.
sentences.translation: Moramo provjeriti izvor vijesti prije nego što je objavimo.
sentences.translationEn: We should check the source of the news before sharing it.
